assessment.note: She names a concrete consequence of her waiting pattern — late stakeholder surprise and trust erosion — which signals mild clarity risk; wellbeing was not engaged.

new_queue.label: Surprised late
new_queue.name: When stakeholders feel surprised late, what gap does that point to in your approach?
new_queue.description: Turns the evidence she named into a plainly stated performance gap around stakeholder engagement and visibility.

new_queue.label: Friction point
new_queue.name: Where did cross-functional friction slow you down most this quarter?
new_queue.description: Identifies the specific collaboration point where execution met resistance.

new_queue.label: Escalation judgment
new_queue.name: What kind of call did you hold too long before escalating this quarter?
new_queue.description: Probes decision-making under uncertainty and calibration of when to pull in help.

new_queue.label: Next-quarter focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to work on first over the next quarter?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete priority and commitment without introducing a new thread.
